tempest 0.1.0
  • Reference

A vitals solver that answers questions using retrieval + citations

Source: R/evals.R
tempest_solver_cited_answer.Rd

This solver is designed to evaluate the end-to-end behavior of the tempest retrieval + citation discipline. It is intentionally lighter than a full tempest_run() call.

Usage

tempest_solver_cited_answer(
  input,
  config = tempest_config(),
  solver_chat = NULL
)

Arguments

input

Character vector of questions.

config

A TempestConfig.

solver_chat

Optional (ignored). Present to match vitals conventions.

Value

A list with result and solver_chat (and solver_metadata).

On this page
